message: TASK: Key Interop (v0.3 roadmap item). Normalize ed25519 key format between Rust and TypeScript implementations. Currently TS uses PEM-wrapped keys (.keys/public.pem, .keys/private.pem) and Rust uses raw hex (.keys/public.key, .keys/private.key). They need to use the same format so agents initialized with one runtime can verify messages from the other. Pick one format (recommend raw hex — simpler, no PEM overhead) and update both implementations. Files: src/crypto.ts (TS), rust/src/crypto.rs (Rust). Codebase is at /home/node/.openclaw/workspace/openfused.
